backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor that manages Vedu chatbot messages, user booking sessions, and appointment booking flow with Google Apps Script integration for submitting collected user data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of Vedu chatbot UI, chat interface, appointment booking assistance, and greeting message functionality with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including pages, navigation, forms, hooks, and styling with details on routing, WhatsApp integration, and booking functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the application including custom Veda Healar brand colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, route definitions for all pages, Layout component wrapping Navbar, Footer, WhatsAppButton, VeduChatbot, and ThemeProvider configuration.
frontend/src/components/AboutIntro.tsx: About section component displaying Veda Healar's mission with three feature cards (Authentic Vedic Practice, Personalized Guidance, Proven Results) using scroll reveal animations and icons.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: React form component for booking consultations that validates user input (name, email, phone, date, time, service) and submits data to a Google Apps Script endpoint using no-cors mode with React Query mutation handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying brand logo, contact information (email, WhatsApp), navigation links, and social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube) with copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with cosmic background image, mandala overlay, animated sparkles icon, headline text about Vedic wisdom, and CTA buttons linking to booking and services pages.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile menu toggle, navigation links with active state highlighting, and a prominent 'Book Now' button that changes appearance on scroll.
frontend/src/components/PaymentPlacehold: Placeholder component displaying payment method options (Razorpay, Stripe, UPI, Bank Transfer) with security badges and commented code structure for future payment gateway integration.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying individual service details (icon, name, description, price) with scroll-reveal animation and a 'Book Now' link that passes service ID as query parameter.
frontend/src/components/ServicesOverview: Services section component that displays a grid of five service cards (numerology, name correction, lucky numbers, reiki, business analysis) with scroll animations and a link to the full services page.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSlid: A testimonials carousel component that displays client reviews with auto-rotation every 5 seconds, manual navigation arrows, star ratings, and scroll reveal animations on a mandala-patterned background.
frontend/src/components/VeduChatbot.tsx: A chatbot interface component that renders a floating chat widget with Vedu avatar, manages message history, handles user input, and integrates with the useVeduChat hook for processing conversations and booking assistance.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating button component that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message to contact the business at phone number 917096912557.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, automatically invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout flows, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for Vedu chat data operations including fetching messages, starting booking sessions, processing responses, and submitting bookings through the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: A custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to detect when an element enters the viewport and triggers a visibility state change for scroll-based reveal animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useVeduChat.ts: Manages the Vedu chatbot conversation flow including multi-step booking process with validation, service selection, form data collection, and Google Sheets submission for appointments.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes with color variables, sets font families (Inter for body, Playfair Display for headings), and includes custom animations (fade-in-up/left/right) and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component that describes Veda Healar's mission and values, featuring scroll-reveal animations and sections covering the practice's story, Vedic wisdom approach, and three guiding principles (Authenticity, etc.) with icons.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: Consultation booking page with a form for scheduling appointments, displays consultation details and expectations, shows a success confirmation after submission, and includes a payment placeholder component.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying location, WhatsApp number, email, and social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube) with icon-based layout and scroll-reveal animations.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage component that composes four main sections: HeroSection, ServicesOverview, AboutIntro, and TestimonialsSlider.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services page listing five offerings (Numerology Reading, Name Correction, Lucky Number Selection, Reiki Healing, Business Name Analysis) with descriptions and pricing, rendered using ServiceCard components with staggered animations and a CTA section.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: React page component displaying client testimonials in a grid layout with hero section, testimonial cards showing ratings and reviews, and a CTA section linking to the booking page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palette (deepBlue, goldAccent, beigeBackground), font families (Playfair Display, Inter), and extended theme tokens for the Vedahealer design system.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting the Vedahealer website with existing chatbot UI features (Vedu assistant) and pending backend implementation for AI-powered chat responses about services and booking.
